examples:
Command Example
!ip ip=8.8.8.8 days=30 verbose=true
Context Example
Human Readable Output
2. Query a block of IP addresses
Queries a block of IPs to check against the database
Base Command
abuseipdb-check-cidr-block

!ip ip=8.8.8.8 days=30 verbose=true
Context Example
Human Readable Output
2. Query a block of IP addresses
Queries a block of IPs to check against the database
Base Command
abuseipdb-check-cidr-block
Input
name: abuseipdb-check-cidr-block

outputs.description: IP address AbuseIPDB.IP.AbuseConfidenceScore Confidence score fetched from AbuseIPDB
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Address

outputs.description: Country associated with this IP Address AbuseIPDB.IP.Geo.CountryCode Country code associated with this IP Address
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Geo.Country

outputs.description: The hostame(s) of the IP address. AbuseIPDB.IP.IpVersion The version of the IP address.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Hostnames

outputs.description: Is the IP address public. AbuseIPDB.IP.IsTor Is the IP address a Tor IP.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.IsPublic

outputs.description: Is the IP address whitelisted. AbuseIPDB.IP.LastReportedAt When the IP address was last reported.
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.IsWhitelisted

outputs.description: The distinct number of users. AbuseIPDB.IP.TotalReports The number of times this address has been reported
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.NumDistinctUsers

outputs.description: The IP address DBotScore.Type The type (ip)
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The vendor that determined this IP address to be malicious AbuseIPDB.IP.Malicious.Detections The Detections that led to the verdict
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: Usage type of the IP. AbuseIPDB.IP.Domain
outputs.name: AbuseIPDB.IP.UsageType
